design_philosophy: Premium feminine aesthetic. Inspired by Apple, Pinterest, Notion, Glossier, Rhode, Rare Beauty. Clean, minimalist, deeply warm and inviting. Focus on high-quality typography, generous white space, smooth rounded corners, and soft glassmorphism.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-heading font-medium tracking-tight text-[#2B1E16]
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-heading font-medium tracking-tight text-[#2B1E16]
scale.h3: text-xl sm:text-2xl font-heading font-medium tracking-tight text-[#2B1E16]
scale.h4: text-lg sm:text-xl font-body font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#2B1E16]

extension_popup.structure: Fixed glass header, scrollable main content with generous padding (p-4 to p-6), sticky bottom action bar. No horizontal scrolling.

dashboard.sidebar: w-64 fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen bg-[#FCFAF8] border-r border-[#E8DFD8] p-6

layout.spacing: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. gap-6 for grids. Optical alignment prioritized over rigid geometric grids.

components.cards: bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-[#E8DFD8]/50 overflow-hidden transition-transform duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_12px_40px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)]
components.glass_header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-white/20 sticky top-0 z-50
components.chips: rounded-full px-4 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium transition-colors cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-2

buttons.primary: bg-[#C47C47] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-semibold transition-all hover:bg-[#B36B36] active:scale-95 shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-[#E8DFD8] text-[#5C4033] rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-semibold transition-all hover:bg-[#FCFAF8] active:scale-95

components.looks_outfit_card: Includes itemized breakdown (top, bottom, footwear, bag) with color swatches and aesthetic tags. Uses a subtle 'bento' internal layout.

micro_animations.hover_states: Soft scaling (hover:-translate-y-1) and shadow deepening for cards. Opacity fades (opacity-80 to opacity-100) for links.
micro_animations.page_transitions: Subtle fade-in and slide-up (translate-y-4 to translate-y-0) staggered for list items and grids.

empty_states.style: Minimalist single-color line art or abstract soft blobs (SVG) matching the palette (Cream/Caramel). Friendly, encouraging copy. Always include a primary CTA.

examples.wishlist: Illustration of a hanger or empty shopping bag with text 'Your wishlist is waiting for its first crush.'
examples.inspiration: Illustration of an empty moodboard frame.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text must meet WCAG AA standards. Ensure hover states maintain readability.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: ALL interactive elements must have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case representing their role (e.g., data-testid='save-button', data-testid='category-filter-chip').

media_and_assets.icon_library: @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone or Light weight for elegant feel)

image_urls.description: Minimalist skincare bottles with warm light
Sophisticated flatlay of makeup brush and jar on pastel background
Woman in brown coat, minimalist aesthetic outfit
Brown leather handbag on white surface

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the application strictly follows the Caramel Popcorn aesthetic: warm creamy tones, soft rounded borders (rounded-3xl for major cards), and minimal dropshadows.
The extension popup must have fixed dimensions w-[380px] h-[560px] in its wrapper and look like a native premium iOS widget.
Dashboard must utilize the 'Bento grid' pattern for the overview, and 'Masonry' for the Inspiration board.
DO NOT use generic sans-serif fonts (like Inter) for headings. Explicitly integrate and use 'Playfair Display' via Google Fonts.
Always use the provided image URLs for placeholders and dummy data. Never use via.placeholder.com or similar services.
Implement save types accurately with their designated background colors, text colors, and emojis.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements without fail.
